Conversely, a material is a poor conductor if it impedes electron flow or has high resistance
Therefore, the ability of a material to conduct electricity is inversely related to its resistance
FOL-sentences: FORALL x (material(x) AND allow_electron_flow(x) AND low_resist(x) IMPLIES good_conduct_electricity(x))
FORALL x (material(x) AND impedes_electron_flow(x) OR high_resist(x) IMPLIES poor_conduct_electricity(x))
FORALL x (material(x) AND conduct_electricity(x) IMPLIES NOT high_resist(x))

Algae exemplify a specific category of plant. They are characterized by green , leaflike structures and their ability to produce food through photosynthesis. Consequently , any organism synthesizing its own food , obtaining energy from sunlight , and possessing chlorophyll – a description encompassing photosynthetic plants and algae – is logically classified as either a plant or an algae.
